title: ED v. Mamata Banerjee case in Supreme Court: LIVE UPDATES
description: The Supreme Court is hearing the Enforcement Director’s (ED) plea against West Bengal Chief Minister and TMC leader Mamata Banerjee, accusing her of interfering with its probe at I-PAC’s Kolkata office. A Bench of Justices PK Mishra and NV Anjaria is hearing the matter.Yesterday, the Court had orally observed that Banerjee’s alleged actions had imperilled democracy. The State police has, meanwhile, questioned the maintainability of the ED's plea before the Supreme Court. Track this page for live
